name: remotion-motionpngtuber
description: Add MotionPNGTuber characters and VOICEVOX/AivisSpeech narration to Remotion videos.

interface.shortDescription: Add MotionPNGTuber characters and Japanese TTS narration to Remotion videos.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that teaches Remotion workflows for MotionPNGTuber assets: rendering mouthless character bodies, warping mouth sprites from mouth_track.json, preserving body animation, generating VOICEVOX/AivisSpeech narration, and validating synced final renders.
defaultPrompt: Use Remotion MotionPNGTuber to add a MotionPNGTuber character and VOICEVOX/AivisSpeech narration to this Remotion composition.
Use Remotion MotionPNGTuber to fix mouth tracking, body animation sync, or transparent compositing in this Remotion video.
